attributes.name: TwisTorr 305 FS CTR
attributes.description:
TwisTorr 305 FS Remote Controller

The remote control unit for the TwisTorr 305 FS turbo pumps drives the pumps in real time. This unit adapts speed and power as required by gas flow, gas type, pressures, and other factors such as cooling. The controller is capable of reading active gauges and driving accessories such as vent valves and the air cooling fan.

Configuration

  • Remote controller, rack-mounted

Maximum Pump Cable Length

  • 100 m

Operating Environment Relative Humidity

  • 90 % maximum non condensing humidity

Operating Environment Temperature

  • 5° C to 45° C

Pump Model Compatibility

  • TwisTorr 305 FS Turbo Pump

  • TwisTorr 305 FSQ Turbo Pump

  • TwisTorr 305 SF Turbo Pump

Standards and Certifications

  • EN 61010 -1

  • EN 61326-1

  • EN 50581

  • EMC Directiive 2014/30/EU

  • ROHS Directive 2011/65/EU

Weight

  • 1.7 kg
